◎简　　介  

　　Prince Adam and Melaktha investigate the Temple of the Cat, where He-Man retrieves a mysterious feline statue after enduring several magical obstacles. A spy for the Cat People reports the incident to King Paw, who sends his emissary, Kittrina, to the Royal Palace.
